scripts.render:rapport: remotion render RapportTerminal out/_raw-rapport.mp4 --x264-preset=medium && npm run _post -- _raw-rapport.mp4 rapport-terminal.mp4
scripts.render:storytime: remotion render Storytime out/_raw-storytime.mp4 --x264-preset=medium && npm run _post -- _raw-storytime.mp4 storytime.mp4
scripts.render:test: remotion render TestDiagnostic out/_raw-test.mp4 --x264-preset=medium && npm run _post -- _raw-test.mp4 test-diagnostic.mp4
scripts.render:all: npm run render:rapport ; npm run render:storytime ; npm run render:test ; npm run fix:mp4 ; npm run cache:clear
scripts.cache:clear: qlmanage -r cache 2>/dev/null ; qlmanage -r 2>/dev/null ; echo '✓ cache Quick Look purgé'
